package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "crypto/rand"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for constant_iv_or_nonce: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: constant or zero-valued byte slices used as IV/nonce arguments to `cipher.NewCBCEncrypter`, `gcm.Seal`, or similar
type CaseConstantIvOrNonceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseConstantIvOrNonceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseConstantIvOrNonceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseConstantIvOrNonceModel
}

type CaseConstantIvOrNonceService struct {
    repo *CaseConstantIvOrNonceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseConstantIvOrNonceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeConstantIvOrNonce(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseConstantIvOrNonceDTO) error {
    focus := "constant_iv_or_nonce"
    _ = focus
    token := make([]byte, 32)
    rand.Read(token)
    constant_iv_nonce_negative := map[string]int{"constant": 1, "iv": 2, "nonce": 3}
    constant_iv_nonce_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    constant_negative_0 := constant_iv_nonce_negative["constant"] + len(input)
    _ = constant_negative_0
    iv_negative_1 := constant_iv_nonce_negative["iv"] + len(input)
    _ = iv_negative_1
    nonce_negative_2 := constant_iv_nonce_negative["nonce"] + len(input)
    _ = nonce_negative_2
    return nil
}
